verses.text: Fulfil my joy: be likeminded, of one accord, of one mind. United. He pleads for harmony among them.
Fulfil my joy: be likeminded, of one accord, of one mind. United. He pleads for harmony among them.
In lowliness 'esteem other better than themselves'; look on the things of others. Humility. Self is set aside for others' good.
In lowliness 'esteem other better than themselves'; look on the things of others. Humility. Self is set aside for others' good.
'Let this mind be in you, which was also in Christ Jesus'; He made Himself of no reputation, obedient unto death. The great example. Christ humbled Himself to the lowest depth.
'Let this mind be in you, which was also in Christ Jesus'; He made Himself of no reputation, obedient unto death. The great example. Christ humbled Himself to the lowest depth.
'Let this mind be in you, which was also in Christ Jesus'; He made Himself of no reputation, obedient unto death. The great example. Christ humbled Himself to the lowest depth.
'Let this mind be in you, which was also in Christ Jesus'; He made Himself of no reputation, obedient unto death. The great example. Christ humbled Himself to the lowest depth.
'God also hath highly exalted him... that at the name of Jesus every knee should bow.' Exalted Lord. The humbled Christ is now crowned over all.
'God also hath highly exalted him... that at the name of Jesus every knee should bow.' Exalted Lord. The humbled Christ is now crowned over all.
'God also hath highly exalted him... that at the name of Jesus every knee should bow.' Exalted Lord. The humbled Christ is now crowned over all.
Work out your own salvation; 'it is God which worketh in you both to will and to do.' God in us. Our effort and God's working go together.
Work out your own salvation; 'it is God which worketh in you both to will and to do.' God in us. Our effort and God's working go together.
Do all 'without murmurings'; shine as lights, holding forth the word of life. Bright witness. A blameless life shines in a dark world.
Do all 'without murmurings'; shine as lights, holding forth the word of life. Bright witness. A blameless life shines in a dark world.
Do all 'without murmurings'; shine as lights, holding forth the word of life. Bright witness. A blameless life shines in a dark world.
If I be offered upon the sacrifice of your faith, I joy and rejoice with you. Glad sacrifice. He would gladly be poured out for them.
If I be offered upon the sacrifice of your faith, I joy and rejoice with you. Glad sacrifice. He would gladly be poured out for them.
I trust to send Timothy, who 'will naturally care for your state.' True care. Few seek others' good as Timothy does.
I trust to send Timothy, who 'will naturally care for your state.' True care. Few seek others' good as Timothy does.
I trust to send Timothy, who 'will naturally care for your state.' True care. Few seek others' good as Timothy does.
Ye know his proven worth; he served with me as a son. Tried servant. His faithfulness is well known.
Ye know his proven worth; he served with me as a son. Tried servant. His faithfulness is well known.
Ye know his proven worth; he served with me as a son. Tried servant. His faithfulness is well known.
I send Epaphroditus, who was 'sick nigh unto death,' but God had mercy. Spared. God restored the faithful brother.
I send Epaphroditus, who was 'sick nigh unto death,' but God had mercy. Spared. God restored the faithful brother.
I send Epaphroditus, who was 'sick nigh unto death,' but God had mercy. Spared. God restored the faithful brother.
Receive him with gladness; he hazarded his life for the work. Honour him. He risked all to serve Christ and them.
Receive him with gladness; he hazarded his life for the work. Honour him. He risked all to serve Christ and them.
